caption: This educational presentation on "CRYOGENIC ENGINEERING" focuses on "Tutorial – 3" and the "Figure of Merit (FOM)." Each frame displays a temperature-entropy (T-S) diagram showing various thermodynamic processes, including "T=const", "D=const", "p=const", and "h=const". The diagram is annotated with numbers 1 through 4 and includes a temperature axis with markers for 200 and 300. The footer indicates the presentation is by "Prof. M D Atrey, Department of Mechanical Engineering, IIT Bombay" and features the NPTEL logo. As the sequence progresses, two blue boxes containing mathematical formulas appear over the diagram: one stating "W / m_r = 2772.1" and another stating "W / m_r = 476.0". A small mouse cursor is visible, moving across the screen and hovering near the second blue box in the final frames.
